meta.title: Leadership | Prayaan Capital
meta.description: Meet the Board of Directors, Management Team, and Advisory Board of Prayaan Capital.

sections.headline: Leadership Rooted in Experience
sections.subheadline: Bankers, technologists, and domain experts united by a commitment to MSME financial inclusion.

members.name: Director Name 1
members.bio: 30+ years in NBFC, commercial banking. Former senior leader at [Bank Name].

members.name: Director Name 2
members.bio: Chartered Accountant with 25 years in financial services and audit.

members.name: Director Name 3
members.bio: Retired IAS officer with deep expertise in rural development and finance.

members.name: Manager Name 1
members.bio: CA with 20 years in NBFC treasury and fundraising.

members.name: Manager Name 2
members.bio: MSME credit specialist with 18 years of underwriting experience.

members.name: Manager Name 3
members.bio: Full-stack technologist and AI engineer. Built Prayaan's lending platform.

members.name: Manager Name 4
members.bio: 15+ years in branch operations and collections across South India.

members.name: Manager Name 5
members.bio: RBI NBFC regulations specialist and company secretary.

sections.headline: Governance Structure
sections.body: Prayaan Capital follows robust corporate governance practices as mandated by RBI for NBFC-ND-SI entities. The Board meets quarterly and oversees risk, audit, credit, and nomination & remuneration committees.

bullets.title: Audit Committee
bullets.body: Chaired by Independent Director. Reviews financials and internal audit.

bullets.title: Credit Committee
bullets.body: Sanctions loans above branch authority. Meets weekly.

bullets.title: Risk Management Committee
bullets.body: Monitors ALM, credit concentration, and operational risk.

bullets.title: Nomination & Remuneration Committee
bullets.body: Governs Board composition and senior management remuneration.
